blended.narrative: Steamboat is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,560 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.9" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 53".
